theme_and_archetype.rationale: For an Italian construction company's financial dashboard, we need a 'Control Room' aesthetic that combines industrial precision (blueprints, concrete) with financial clarity. The UI is objective, rigid, and functional. High contrast ensures readability in various environments.

typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Import fonts: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap'); @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400&display=swap'); Configure Tailwind to use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for sans/headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for body, and 'IBM Plex Mono' for mono. 'Cabinet Grotesk' gives a strong, architectural feel. 'IBM Plex Sans' ensures technical readability. 'IBM Plex Mono' is for financial figures to align decimals perfectly.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use pure 1px solid borders for cards and tables. Avoid soft shadows.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-none. Use borders instead of shadows to delineate sections. Hover states can have a subtle shadow-sm.

components_strategy.cards: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm), 1px solid border-zinc-200. No shadow by default.
components_strategy.tables: High-density data grids. IBM Plex Mono for financial columns. Right-align all currency columns. Zebra striping (bg-zinc-50) on alternating rows for readability.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary buttons use Blueprint Blue (#0F4C81).
components_strategy.sidebar: Dark slate/zinc-950 with white text. Represents the structural 'beam' of the app. High contrast from the main content area.
components_strategy.badges: Traffic light status for EBITDA/Margin. Red (<15%), Green (>20%). Small, uppercase mono labels.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts via Shadcn. Use line charts for 'Cash Flow' and pie/donut charts for 'Cost Breakdown'. Chart colors should use brand blue, concrete grey, and safety yellow/orange.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) with shadow-sm. Interactive elements must have clear hover states.

image_urls.description: Blueprint top view, ideal for 'no projects selected' or empty state background

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons with sharp, consistent stroke-widths (1.5px or 2px). Essential icons: LayoutDashboard, HardHat (for projects/cantieri), Wallet, LineChart, AlertTriangle, Calculator.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements and key text MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='ebitda-metric', data-testid='project-list-item').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast ratios, especially for financial figures.

specific_functionalities.dashboard_riassuntiva: Top row KPI cards: Fatturato, EBITDA (with traffic light badge), Cash Position, Break Even. Use bento grid layout.
specific_functionalities.break_even_calculator: Card layout with inputs for 'Costi fissi', 'Prezzo medio', 'Costo variabile' and a large mono result output.
specific_functionalities.ebitda_monitor: Highlight prominently. Use status colors based on thresholds.
specific_functionalities.cash_flow: Bar or Line chart for Entrate/Uscite over time.
specific_functionalities.gestione_cantieri: Table listing projects (cantieri) with columns for Materials, Labor, Subcontractor costs.
specific_functionalities.ai_advisor: A distinct card with a subtle gradient/shimmer border (The 'Tracing Beam' pattern) to indicate futuristic AI. State: 'In arrivo' (Coming soon) to act as a placeholder.
specific_functionalities.language: All UI text MUST be in Italian.
